svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.1.2 Chrome/138.0.7204.243 Electron/37.4.0 Safari/537.36" version="28.1.2" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="gNFHE5D4J32GcqalV_X2" name="epoll"> <mxGraphModel dx="1226" dy="849" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-3" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-1" target="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-1" value="客户端发起请求" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="150" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-5" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-2" target="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-2" value="内核生成socket和对应的fd" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="250" y="270" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-4" value="epoll同时监听多个fd" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="400" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-9" value="" style="rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.017;exitY=0.504;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-6" target="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-8"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="170" y="575" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-10" value="收到事件" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];" vertex="1" connectable="0" parent="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-9"> <mxGeometry x="-0.0776" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="32" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-13" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-6" target="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-12"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-14" value="没有事件" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];" vertex="1" connectable="0" parent="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-13"> <mxGeometry x="-0.5459" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="10" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-6" value="是否有请求？" style="html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;aspect=fixed;shape=isoRectangle;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="245" y="530" width="150" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="320" y="530" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-8" value="处理请求" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="110" y="650" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-12" value="高效休眠（监听）" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="414" y="650" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kNo0SdTPesjJTpdlMddP-16" value="<div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="text-wrap-mode: nowrap; background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">注：事件是指fd发生变化，</span></div><div style="text-align: justify; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">比如socket缓冲区中有新数据--fd可读；</div><div style="text-align: justify; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">socket缓冲区有空间可以写入新数据--fd可写；</div><div style="text-align: justify; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">连接断开/出现错误--fd出问题</div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=center;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="175" y="740" width="290" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
